name: Worldpay
description: Worldpay — Global payment processor by FIS handling 40B+ transactions annually with acquiring, e-commerce, and POS across 146 countries.

seo.title: Worldpay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Worldpay: Worldpay — Global payment processor by FIS handling 40B+ transactions annually with acquiring, e-commerce, and POS across 146 countries.

when_to_use: Global card acquiring across 146 countries via single integration
POS and e-commerce processing for enterprise retail chains
Alternative payment methods and APMs for global checkouts
3DS2 and fraud tools for high-volume card transaction processing

pros: Acquiring, e-commerce, POS under one roof
cons: Legacy UX across multiple acquired products
review.verdict: Global enterprise processor with unmatched coverage — overkill and painful for anything smaller than mid-market.
review.best_for: Large enterprises needing global acquiring across 100+ countries with omnichannel coverage
review.not_for: SMBs or developer-first teams wanting clean APIs and self-serve pricing
